string.description: Text string value used for names, IDs, and configuration parameters

integer.description: Whole number value used for counts, ports, and numeric settings

boolean.description: True or false value used for flags and toggle settings

object.description: JSON object containing key-value pairs returned from Azure API responses

array.description: JSON array of values or objects, commonly returned when listing Azure resources

ResourceId.description: Fully qualified Azure resource identifier path
